card.payerHint: You are the payer in this contract. Only the receiver can change or stop it.

new_flow.subtitlePick: Choose a user and contract type
new_flow.searchEmpty: Search for a user to create a contract.
new_flow.typeQuestion: What kind of contract do you want to make?
new_flow.debtDesc: Set debt, interest and payment terms.

form.interestHint: Interest is applied automatically at the beginning of every month.
form.selectedPaysViewerHint: You can change amount and stop the contract.
form.viewerPaysSelectedHint: You cannot change amount, stop, or deactivate this contract.

changeAmount.title: Update Contract
changeAmount.externalTipHint: Use this field when the sub paid you outside Subm8. This amount will be added as paid.

blackmail.title: Blackmail Info
blackmail.uploadHint: Tap or drop photos/videos here. Only authorized contract users can view them.

stop.title: Stop/Deactivate Contract
stop.deactivateHint: If you deactivate it, interest stops and no payments will be added.
stop.deleteHint: If you delete it, all contract information will be lost forever.
stop.confirmDeactivate: Are you sure you want to deactivate it?
stop.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete it?

states.emptyHint: Create a new contract to see it here.

errors.noPassword: Your account is linked with Google only. Please set a password in your settings first.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes.

autoDrainAcceptModal.cancelAnytime: You can cancel AutoDrain at any time in your payments.
autoDrainAcceptModal.acknowledge: I understand that gifts are voluntary and final. No services are implied.
autoDrainAcceptModal.disclaimer: Gifts are voluntary and not payment for services. Gifts are final (no refunds unless required by law).

success.title: Activated!
success.historyHint: You can check the payment status anytime under Settings → Payments.

stripe.savedCardNote: You already have a saved card.
stripe.newCardNote: The card will be saved automatically after successful activation.

balance.title: Current balance:
balance.lockedHint: Locked balance automatically becomes available 30 days after the payment is received.

paymentsPage.guestNote: Please sign in to view your payment history.
paymentsPage.title: Payments & History

payoutModal.title: Payout
payoutModal.subtitle: Payouts currently run exclusively via Stripe Connect.
payoutModal.note: Note: Payouts require completed Stripe Express onboarding.

stripeCard.intro: Connect your Stripe Express account. Then you can request payouts.
stripeCard.incompleteHint: Your Stripe Express onboarding isn't completed yet. Open onboarding and finish all steps to enable bank payouts.

transferOnly.title: Stripe payouts not enabled
transferOnly.body: You can still proceed by transferring funds to your Stripe balance only. A bank payout will happen only after you enable payouts.
transferOnly.payoutsNotEnabled: Bank payouts are not enabled on your Stripe account.

recovery.stillProcessing: Your payment is still being processed.
recovery.noDoubleCharge: This can take a moment. You won't be charged twice — we're just checking the status.

budget.blocked: 🚫 Budget reached — payments are blocked until the next period.
budget.warnOver: ⚠️ You have exceeded your budget. Do you want to proceed anyway?
budget.warnAck: Yes, I want to pay anyway
budget.notifyOver: ℹ️ You are over your budget. You will be notified after payment.

ack.checkboxShort: I agree to the <terms>Terms and Services</terms>.
ack.helper: This is a voluntary gift, not payment for services.

disclaimer.top: Gifts are voluntary and not payment for services. Subm8 only facilitates the transfer.
disclaimer.legal: By confirming you are sending a voluntary gift. This is not payment for services. Gifts are final (no refunds unless required by law).

errors.confirmProcessingTimeout: Payment is still being finalized… please try again shortly.
